title: Architect modern applications in Azure
summary: Learn how to build modern applications using PaaS services for applications, caching, containers and Kubernetes in Azure.

sections.title: Architect modern applications in Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to build modern applications using PaaS services for applications, caching, containers and Kubernetes in Azure.

lessons.title: Build a containerized web application with Docker
lessons.content_md:
Use Docker to build, store, and manage private container images with the Azure Container Registry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-containers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build a containerized web application with Docker

lessons.title: Build and store container images with Azure Container Registry
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Docker to build, store, and manage private container images with the Azure Container Registry.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/build-and-store-container-images/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build and store container images with Azure Container Registry

lessons.title: Host a web application with Azure App Service
lessons.content_md:
Create a website using C#, Java, Python, or Node.js and deploy it through the hosted web app platform in Azure App Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/host-a-web-app-with-azure-app-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Host a web application with Azure App Service

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Kubernetes Service
lessons.content_md:
Get acquainted with the Azure Kubernetes open-source container-orchestration system for automating application deployment, scaling, and management.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-kubernetes-service/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Architect modern applications in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Architect modern applications in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
